Our programs

A complete circle of support, from access to leadership.

No single intervention raises a leader. Our programs work together across three stages — meeting each child where they are and walking with them all the way.

The model

Access · Growth · Leadership

Stage 01

Access

Enrolment support, learning materials and the safety to keep showing up — removing every barrier between a child and their classroom.

Stage 02

Growth

Mentorship, values, life skills and academic support nurture each child's mind and character so they grow with purpose.

Stage 03

Leadership

Young people emerge confident, responsible and purpose-driven — ready to lead, and to lift others as they rise.

Eight programs

Eight ways we walk with a child

01 · ACCESS

Education Access

We remove the barriers that keep children out of school — and the ones that push them out — so every child has the opportunity to be in class and to stay there.

  • Enrolment & re-entry support
  • Retention tracking & follow-up
02 · ACCESS

Learning Materials

Books, supplies and educational resources placed directly in eager hands — turning willingness into real, measurable progress.

  • Textbooks, stationery & uniforms
  • Learning kits for new terms
03 · ACCESS

Scholarships

Supporting school enrolment and retention so that finances never decide a child's future. A scholarship is a vote of confidence in a young person's potential.

  • Termly & full-cycle scholarships
  • Merit & need-based pathways
04 · GROWTH

Skills Development

Equipping young people with valuable life and career-ready skills — from communication and problem-solving to digital and STEM foundations.

  • Life skills & financial literacy
  • Digital & STEM workshops
05 · GROWTH

Mentorship

Guidance and positive role models who believe in every child. A mentor helps a young person see — and reach for — what they're truly capable of.

  • One-to-one & group mentoring
  • Career & academic guidance
06 · GROWTH

Child Protection

Shielding children from abuse, violence, exploitation and trafficking — because no child can learn or lead without first being safe.

  • Safeguarding & awareness
  • Community protection networks
07 · LEADERSHIP

Character Development

Building integrity, confidence and sound judgement from within — the inner foundation on which real leadership is built.

  • Values & ethics formation
  • Confidence & resilience building
08 · LEADERSHIP

Leadership Development

Preparing confident, purpose-driven changemakers — young people ready to lead in their schools, communities and beyond.

  • Student leadership programs
  • Youth summits & peer leadership
Fund a program

Your support powers every one of these

Sponsor a child's full journey — or fund the program closest to your heart.

Support a ChildPartner with us
